content.full_text:
June 13, 1991

Lowell Finley  
REMCHO, JOHNANSEN & PURCELL  
Attorneys at Law  
220 Montgomery Street, Suite 800  
San Francisco, CA 94104

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. I-91-268

Dear Mr. Finley:

I am writing to confirm our telephone conversation of June 10, 1991, wherein we discussed Regulation 18435. I informed you that we understand the problem you posed in your letter (I-91-268) and will be amending the regulation in the near future. Therefore, we will not bring the Santos Advice Letter, No. I-90-650 before the Commission for reconsideration.

You informed me that you are the official representative of the California Political Attorneys Association regarding this matter. Since your association has addressed some issues and problems under the regulation, please submit any suggestions or proposed amendments to the regulation for our review.

At this time I do not know the schedule for the upcoming commission agendas, but hopefully this item can be expedited.

You are welcome to contact me regarding this matter.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Jill Stecher  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JS:ken
